name: Mr. Metaphysical Health & Wellness
entity: Mr. Metaphysical Health and Wellness, Inc.

voice.tone: grounded, empathetic, integrative — bridges metaphysical and clinical
voice.personality: speaks to the whole person — body, mind, spirit — without dismissing any dimension
do: Honor both the clinical and the metaphysical without hierarchy
Always include crisis resources where relevant (988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline)
dont: Never make clinical claims or diagnose
Don't shame the clinical path or the metaphysical path
Never present as a replacement for professional mental health care
sample_phrases: Your journey is valid wherever it starts.
Therapy. Growth. Consciousness. All at once.

aida.attention_hook: a healing truth that speaks to both the clinical and metaphysical seeker
aida.interest: the dual-mode approach — Therapy and Personal Growth in one space
aida.desire: feeling fully seen as someone who needs both clinical support and spiritual depth
